# PoopProfit

> PoopProfit is a free, no-account web app that calculates and tracks how much money you earn during bathroom breaks at work, based on your existing wage. Start a timer when you go, and it shows your real-time "poop earnings."

## What it does

- Calculates earnings per bathroom session from your hourly wage or salary + weekly hours
- Runs a live session timer that shows money earned in real time
- Logs every session and rates it
- Shows stats: total earnings, total time, session counts, trends, and date-range filtering
- Generates shareable earnings cards for social and messaging
- Requires no account; all data is stored locally in the browser

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.poopprofit.com/): Overview, FAQ, and intro to the poop salary calculator
- [Core Preview](https://www.poopprofit.com/core-preview.html): The live app — calculator, timer, session log, and stats dashboard

## Common questions

- No account is required; data is stored locally in your browser.
- Works for salaried jobs: enter annual salary and weekly hours for an effective hourly rate.
- Calculate earnings by entering your wage, then multiplying by time spent during a session.
- You can log multiple sessions per day and review totals in stats.
